query: SELECT wh.professionalId, p.name as profName, wh.dayOfWeek, wh.startTime, wh.endTime FROM working_hours wh JOIN professionals p ON wh.professionalId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 1 ORDER BY wh.professionalId, wh.dayOfWeek;
